# translateX

**Type Property**

A value function translates by the input value along the x-axis. Animations referencing this value function must provide a single input value.

## Declaration

```swift
static let translateX: CAValueFunctionName
```

## Constants

- **translate**: A value function that translates by the input values along all three axis. Animations using this value transform function must provide animation values in an `NSArray` of three `NSNumber` instances that specify the (x, y, z) translate values.
- **translateY**: A value function translates by the input value along the y-axis. Animations referencing this value function must provide a single input value.
- **translateZ**: A value function translates by the input value along the z-axis. Animations referencing this value function must provide a single input value.
